data.title: Braze: Accelerating Fundamentals, Strengthened Outlook, and Attractive Risk-Reward Support Buy Rating
data.description:
TD Cowen analyst Derrick Wood reiterated a Buy rating on Braze yesterday and set a price target of $30.00.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Derrick Wood has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to Braze’s accelerating fundamentals and execution. The company posted another quarter of faster organic revenue growth, solidly outpacing expectations, supported by improved go-to-market performance under new sales leadership and a differentiated AI-driven product offering that is winning share from legacy vendors.

Derrick Wood’s rating is based on management’s notably stronger multi-year outlook, including revenue guidance well ahead of consensus and stable margin expectations, which signals confidence in sustainable growth. He also highlights rising enterprise traction, improving net retention, expanding large-customer cohorts, and a sizable share repurchase program as reinforcing management’s conviction and the stock’s risk-reward profile.

In another report released yesterday, Needham also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $50.00 price target.

BRZE’s price has also changed dramatically for the past six months – from $32.130 to $18.020, which is a -43.92% drop .
